parseBody<T = Record<string, unknown>>(c: Context): Promise<T> {\n  try {\n    return await c.req.json<T>();\n  } catch {\n    throw new Error('Invalid JSON body');\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get error message from unknown error\n */\nexport function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string {\n  if (error instanceof Error) return error.message;\n  if (typeof error === 'string') return error;\n  return 'Unknown error';\n}\n\n/**\n * Format date for D1 storage (ISO 8601)\n */\nexport function formatDate(date: Date = new Date()): string {\n  return date.toISOString();\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate session expiry date (7 days from now)\n */\nexport function getSessionExpiry(days: number = 7): string {\n  const expiresAt = new Date();\n  expiresAt.setDate(expiresAt.getDate() + days);\n  return expiresAt.toISOString();\n}\n", "/**\n * Audit logging for DAKKHO Admin API using D1\n */\n\nimport type { Env } from '../env';\nimport { generateId } from './utils';\n\n/**\n * Log an audit action to D1\n */\nexport async function logAudit(\n  env: Env,\n  adminId: string,\n  action: string,\n  resourceType: string,\n  resourceId: string | undefined,\n  details?: unknown\n): Promise<void> {\n  try {\n    await env.DB.prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO audit_logs (id, action, resource_type, resource_id, user_id, details, created_at)\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, datetime('now'))`\n    )\n      .bind(\n        generateId(),\n        action,\n        resourceType,\n        resourceId || null,\n        adminId,\n        details ? JSON.stringify(details) : '{}'\n      )\n      .run();\n  } catch (error) {\n    // Audit logging should never fail the request\n    console.error('Audit log failed:', error);\n  }\n}\n", "/**\n * Auth routes \u2014 POST /login, POST /check, DELETE /logout\n * D1-only: Password verification uses SHA-256 hash from users table\n */\n\nimport { Hono } from 'hono';\nimport type { Env } from '../env';\nimport type { AuthVariables } from '../lib/auth';\nimport { adminAuthMiddleware } from '../lib/auth';\nimport { generateId, getSessionExpiry, getErrorMessage } from '../lib/utils';\nimport { logAudit } from '../lib/audit';\n\nconst authRoutes = new Hono<{ Bindings: Env; Variables: AuthVariables }>();\n\n/**\n * Hash a password using Web Crypto API (SHA-256)\n * In production, consider using bcrypt via a service worker or Argon2\n */\nasync function hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {\n  const encoder = new TextEncoder();\n  const data = encoder.encode(password);\n  const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', data);\n  const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer));\n  return hashArray.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');\n}\n\n// POST /login \u2014 Create admin session\nauthRoutes.post('/login', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const { email, password } = await c.req.json<{ email: string; password: string }>();\n\n    if (!email || !password) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Email and password are required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    // Step 1: Look up user in D1 users table\n    const user = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id, email, full_name, role, password_hash, is_active FROM users WHERE email = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    )\n      .bind(email)\n      .first<{ id: string; email: string; full_name: string; role: string; password_hash: string; is_active: number }>();\n\n    if (!user) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Invalid email or password' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    // Step 2: Verify password\n    const hashedInput = await hashPassword(password);\n    if (hashedInput !== user.password_hash) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Invalid email or password' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    // Step 3: Check admin role\n    if (user.role !== 'admin') {\n      return c.json(\n        { error: 'Access denied. Admin role required. Your account does not have admin privileges.' },\n        403\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Step 4: Create admin session in D1\n    const expiresAt = getSessionExpiry(7);\n    const sessionId = generateId();\n\n    // Delete any existing sessions for this user (active or inactive)\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'DELETE FROM admin_sessions WHERE user_id = ?'\n    ).bind(user.id).run();\n\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO admin_sessions (id, user_id, email, name, role, ip_address, user_agent, expires_at, is_active)\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'admin', ?, ?, ?, 1)`\n    )\n      .bind(\n        sessionId,\n        user.id,\n        user.email,\n        user.full_name,\n        c.req.header('x-forwarded-for') || c.req.header('x-real-ip') || 'unknown',\n        c.req.header('user-agent') || 'unknown',\n        expiresAt\n      )\n      .run();\n\n    // Step 5: Return success with session token\n    return c.json({\n      success: true,\n      token: sessionId,\n      user: { id: user.id, email: user.email, name: user.full_name, role: 'admin' },\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = getErrorMessage(error);\n    console.error('Login error:', error);\n    return c.json({ error: message }, 401);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /check \u2014 Verify if session is valid\nauthRoutes.post('/check', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const authHeader = c.req.header('Authorization');\n\n    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {\n      return c.json({ authenticated: false }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const token = authHeader.substring(7);\n\n    const session = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id, user_id, email, name, role, expires_at, is_active FROM admin_sessions WHERE id = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    )\n      .bind(token)\n      .first<{ id: string; user_id: string; email: string; name: string; role: string; expires_at: string; is_active: number }>();\n\n    if (!session || new Date(session.expires_at) < new Date()) {\n      return c.json({ authenticated: false }, 401);\n    }\n\n    return c.json({\n      authenticated: true,\n      user: { id: session.user_id, email: session.email, name: session.name, role: session.role },\n    });\n  } catch {\n    return c.json({ authenticated: false }, 401);\n  }\n});\n\n// DELETE /logout \u2014 Invalidate admin session\nauthRoutes.delete('/logout', adminAuthMiddleware, async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const user = c.get('user');\n\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'UPDATE admin_sessions SET is_active = 0 WHERE user_id = ?'\n    ).bind(user.id).run();\n\n    return c.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = getErrorMessage(error);\n    return c.json({ error: message }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// DELETE /sessions \u2014 Clear all admin sessions (danger zone)\nauthRoutes.delete('/sessions', adminAuthMiddleware, async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE admin_sessions SET is_active = 0 WHERE is_active = 1\"\n    ).run();\n\n    const user = c.get('user');\n    await logAudit(c.env, user.id, 'CLEAR_ALL_SESSIONS', 'auth', undefined, { action: 'clear_all' });\n\n    return c.json({ success: true, cleared: result.meta?.changes || 0 });\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = getErrorMessage(error);\n    return c.json({ error: message }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nexport default authRoutes;\n", "/**\n * R2 native binding helper for Cloudflare Workers\n * Uses native R2Bucket bindings \u2014 NO AWS S3 SDK!\n */\n\nimport type { Env return env.R2_RESOURCES;\n    default:\n      return env.R2_RESOURCES;\n  }\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Generate public URL for an R2 object \u2500\u2500\u2500\n// Note: Workers R2 doesn't support presigned URLs natively.\n// Use R2 public bucket or custom domain for public access.\n\nexport function getPublicUrl(env: Env, bucketType: string, key: string): string {\n  // If R2_PUBLIC_URL is set in env, use it; otherwise fall back\n  const envAny = env as unknown as Record<string, unknown>;\n  const publicUrl = envAny.R2_PUBLIC_URL as string | undefined;\n  if (publicUrl) {\n    return += ' AND is_active = 0';\n    }\n\n    const countResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM users ${where}`\n    ).bind(...params).first();\n\n    const total = \u2500\u2500\u2500 Server Config Types \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nexport interface FeatureToggles {\n  downloads: boolean;\n  bookmarks: boolean;\n  certificates: boolean;\n  liveSessions: boolean;\n  achievements: boolean;\n  assignments: boolean;\n  discussions: boolean;\n  community: boolean;\n  leaderboard: boolean;\n  studyGroups: boolean;\n  peerConnections: boolean;\n  feedback: boolean;\n  pricing: boolean;\n  referral: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface HomePageSections {\n  sections: string[];\n}\n\nexport interface SidebarVisibility {\n  menu: boolean;\n  departments: boolean;\n  semesters: boolean;\n  exams: boolean;\n  community: boolean;\n  general: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface BottomNavTabs {\n  tabs: { id: string; label: string; enabled: boolean; order: number }[];\n}\n\nexport interface TopBarElements {\n  search: boolean;\n  notifications: boolean;\n  avatar: boolean;\n  hamburger: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface ContentProtection {\n  enabled: boolean;\n  noCopy: boolean;\n  noRightClick: boolean;\n  noScreenshot: boolean;\n  noPrint: boolean;\n  customContextMenu: boolean;\n  watermark: boolean;\n  dragProtection: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface ServerConfig {\n  featureToggles: FeatureToggles;\n  homePageSections: HomePageSections;\n  sidebarVisibility: SidebarVisibility;\n  bottomNavTabs: BottomNavTabs;\n  topBarElements: TopBarElements;\n  cardStyle: 'glass' | 'flat' | 'rounded';\n  contentProtection: ContentProtection;\n}\n\nexport const DEFAULT_CONFIG: ServerConfig = {\n  featureToggles: {\n    downloads: true,\n    bookmarks: true,\n    certificates: true,\n    liveSessions: true,\n    achievements: true,\n    assignments: true,\n    discussions: true,\n    community: true,\n    leaderboard: true,\n    studyGroups: true,\n    peerConnections: true,\n    feedback: true,\n    pricing: true,\n    referral: true,\n  },\n  homePageSections: {\n    sections: ['hero', 'continue-watching', 'categories', 'new-releases', 'live', Config routes \u2014 GET, PUT, PUT /reset\n * Uses D1 for persistence and KV for broadcast (replaces MQTT)\n */\n\nimport { Hono } from 'hono';\nimport type { Env } from '../env';\nimport type { AuthVariables } from '../lib/auth';\nimport { adminAuthMiddleware } from '../lib/auth';\nimport { DEFAULT_CONFIG, type ServerConfig } from '../lib/types';\nimport { logAudit } from '../lib/audit';\nimport { getErrorMessage } from '../lib/utils';\n\nconst configRoutes = new Hono<{ Bindings: Env; Variables: AuthVariables }>();\n\n// Apply auth middleware to all config routes\nconfigRoutes.use('*', adminAuthMiddleware);\n\n// GET / \u2014 Get current config\nconfigRoutes.get('/', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    // First try KV cache\n    const cachedConfig = await c.env.KV_CONFIG.get('server_config', 'json');\n    if (cachedConfig) {\n      return c.json(cachedConfig);\n    }\n\n    // Fall back to D1\n    const { results } = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT key, value FROM app_config'\n    ).all<{ key: string; value: string }>();\n\n    const configMap: Record<string, unknown> = {};\n    for (const row of results) {\n      try {\n        configMap[row.key] = JSON.parse(row.value);\n      } catch {\n        configMap[row.key] = row.value;\n      }\n    }\n\n    const config: ServerConfig = {\n      featureToggles: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.featureToggles, ...(configMap.featureToggles as Partial<ServerConfig['featureToggles']>) },\n      homePageSections: (configMap.homePageSections as ServerConfig['homePageSections']) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.homePageSections,\n      sidebarVisibility: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.sidebarVisibility, ...(configMap.sidebarVisibility as Partial<ServerConfig['sidebarVisibility']>) },\n      bottomNavTabs: (configMap.bottomNavTabs as ServerConfig['bottomNavTabs']) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.bottomNavTabs,\n      topBarElements: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.topBarElements, ...(configMap.topBarElements as Partial<ServerConfig['topBarElements']>) },\n      cardStyle: (configMap.cardStyle as ServerConfig['cardStyle']) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.cardStyle,\n      contentProtection: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.contentProtection, ...(configMap.contentProtection as Partial<ServerConfig['contentProtection']>) },\n    };\n\n    // Cache in KV\n    await c.env.KV_CONFIG.put('server_config', JSON.stringify(config), { expirationTtl: 300 });\n\n    return c.json(config);\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = getErrorMessage(error);\n    return c.json({ error: message }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// PUT / \u2014 Update config\nconfigRoutes.put('/', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const config = await c.req.json<ServerConfig>();\n\n    const sections: Record<string, unknown> = {\n      featureToggles: config.featureToggles,\n      homePageSections: config.homePageSections,\n      sidebarVisibility: config.sidebarVisibility,\n      bottomNavTabs: config.bottomNavTabs,\n      topBarElements: config.topBarElements,\n      cardStyle: config.cardStyle,\n      contentProtection: config.contentProtection,\n    };\n\n    // Upsert each section into D1\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(sections)) {\n      await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO app_config (key, value, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\n         ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value = excluded.value, updated_at = datetime('now')`\n      )\n        .bind(key, JSON.stringify(value))\n        .run();\n    }\n\n    // Update KV cache (replaces MQTT broadcast)\n    await c.env.KV_CONFIG.put('server_config', JSON.stringify(config));\n    // Set a config-updated timestamp so clients can poll for changes\n    await c.env.KV_CONFIG.put('config_updated_at', new Date().toISOString());\n\n    const user = c.get('user');\n    await logAudit(c.env, user.id, 'UPDATE_CONFIG', 'config', undefined, config);\n\n    return c.json({ success: true, config });\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = getErrorMessage(error);\n    return c.json({ error: message }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// PUT /reset \u2014 Reset config to defaults\nconfigRoutes.put('/reset', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const config = DEFAULT_CONFIG;\n\n    const sections: Record<string, unknown> = {\n      featureToggles: config.featureToggles,\n      homePageSections: config.homePageSections,\n      sidebarVisibility: config.sidebarVisibility,\n      bottomNavTabs: config.bottomNavTabs,\n      topBarElements: config.topBarElements,\n      cardStyle: config.cardStyle,\n      contentProtection: config.contentProtection,\n    };\n\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(sections)) {\n      await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO app_config (key, value, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\n         ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value = excluded.value, updated_at = datetime('now')`\n      )\n        .bind(key, JSON.stringify(value))\n        .run();\n    }\n\n    await c.env.KV_CONFIG.put('server_config', JSON.stringify(config));\n    await c.env.KV_CONFIG.put('config_updated_at', new Date().toISOString());\n\n    const user = c.get('user');\n    await logAudit(c.env, user.id, 'RESET_CONFIG', 'config', undefined, { action: 'reset_to_defaults' });\n\n    return c.json({ success: true, config });\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = getErrorMessage(error);\n    return c.json({ error: message }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nexport default configRoutes;\n", "/**\n * OneSignal Push Notification integration for DAKKHO\n * Handles push notification sending and token management\n */\n\nimport type { Env } from '../env';\nimport { generateId } from './utils';\n\ninterface PushNotificationPayload {\n  title: string;\n  titleBn?: string;\n  message: string;\n  messageBn?: string;\n  url?: string;\n  data?: Record<string, unknown>;\n  targetPlayerIds?: string[];\n  targetSegment?: string;\n}\n\ninterface PushNotificationResult {\n  success: boolean;\n  recipients: number;\n  errors: string[];\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a push notification via OneSignal\n */\nexport async function sendPushNotification(\n  env: Env,\n  payload: PushNotificationPayload\n): Promise<PushNotificationResult> {\n  try {\n    const appId = env.ONE_SIGNAL_APP_ID;\n    const restApiKey = env.ONE_SIGNAL_REST_API_KEY;\n\n    if (!appId || !restApiKey) {\n      console.warn('OneSignal not configured \u2014 skipping push notification');\n      return { success: false, recipients: 0, errors: ['OneSignal not configured'] };\n    }\n\n    const body: Record<string, unknown> = {\n      app_id: appId,\n      headings: { en: payload.title, bn: payload.titleBn || payload.title },\n      contents: { en: payload.message, bn: payload.messageBn || payload.message },\n      data: payload.data || {},\n    };\n\n    if (payload.url) {\n      body.url = payload.url;\n    }\n\n    if (payload.targetPlayerIds && payload.targetPlayerIds.length > 0) {\n      body.include_player_ids = payload.targetPlayerIds;\n    } else if (payload.targetSegment) {\n      body.included_segments = [payload.targetSegment];\n    } else {\n      body.included_segments = ['All'];\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch('https://onesignal.com/api/v1/notifications', {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: {\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        Authorization: `Basic ${restApiKey}`,\n      },\n      body: JSON.stringify(body),\n    });\n\n    const result = await response.json() as any;\n\n    if (response.ok) {\n      return {\n        success: true,\n        recipients: result.recipients || 0,\n        errors: result.errors || [],\n      };\n    } else {\n      return {\n        success: false,\n        recipients: 0,\n        errors: [result.errors?.[0] || 'Unknown OneSignal error'],\n      };\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('OneSignal push error:', error);\n    return {\n      success: false,\n      recipients: 0,\n      errors: [error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'],\n    };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get push tokens for a specific user\n */\nexport async function getUserPushTokens(\n  env: Env,\n  userId: string\n): Promise<string[]> {\n  try {\n    const result = await env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT push_token FROM user_push_tokens WHERE user_id = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    ).bind(userId).all();\n\n    return result.results.map((row: any) => row.push_token);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Failed to get user push tokens:', error);\n    return [];\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get push tokens for multiple users (batch)\n */\nexport async function getBatchUserPushTokens(\n  env: Env,\n  userIds: string[]\n): Promise<string[]> {\n  if (userIds.length === 0) return [];\n\n  try {\n    const placeholders = userIds.map(() => '?').join(',');\n    const result = await env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT DISTINCT push_token FROM user_push_tokens WHERE user_id IN (${placeholders}) AND is_active = 1`\n    ).bind(...userIds).all();\n\n    return result.results.map((row: any) => row.push_token);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Failed to get batch user push tokens:', error);\n    return [];\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Register a push token for a user\n */\nexport async function registerPushToken(\n  env: Env,\n  userId: string,\n  pushToken: string,\n  deviceType?: string,\n  deviceInfo?: string\n): Promise<void> {\n  try {\n    // Upsert: deactivate existing tokens for this user+token combo, then insert\n    await env.DB.prepare(\n      'UPDATE user_push_tokens SET is_active = 1, updated_at = datetime(\\'now\\') WHERE user_id = ? AND push_token = ?'\n    ).bind(userId, pushToken).run();\n\n    // Try insert (will be ignored if already exists due to update above being sufficient)\n    await env.DB.prepare(`\n      INSERT INTO user_push_tokens (id, user_id, push_token, device_type, device_info, is_active, created_at)\n      SELECT ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, datetime('now')\n      WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_push_tokens WHERE user_id = ? AND push_token = ?)\n    `).bind(generateId(), userId, pushToken, deviceType || null, deviceInfo || null, userId, pushToken).run();\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Failed to register push token:', error);\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Unregister a push token (deactivate it)\n */\nexport async function unregisterPushToken(\n  env: Env,\n  pushToken: string\n): Promise<void> {\n  try {\n    await env.DB.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE user_push_tokens SET is_active = 0, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE push_token = ?\"\n    ).bind(pushToken).run();\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Failed to unregister push token:', error);\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n", "/**\n * Notifications routes \u2014 GET, POST\n * D1-only: All notifications stored in D1 notifications table + notification_logs\n * Also sends OneSignal push notifications\n */\n\nimport { Hono } from 'hono';\nimport type { Env } from '../env';\nimport type { AuthVariables } from '../lib/auth';\nimport { adminAuthMiddleware } from '../lib/auth';\nimport { logAudit } from '../lib/audit';\nimport { getErrorMessage } from '../lib/utils';\nimport { sendPushNotification, getUserPushTokens } from '../lib/onesignal';\n\nconst notificationRoutes = new Hono<{ Bindings: Env; Variables: AuthVariables }>();\n\n// Apply auth middleware to all notification routes\nnotificationRoutes.use('*', adminAuthMiddleware);\n\n// GET / \u2014 List notifications\nnotificationRoutes.get('/', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const page = parseInt(c.req.query('page') || '1');\n    const limit = parseInt(c.req.query('limit') || '20');\n    const userId = c.req.query('userId') || '';\n    const offset = (page - 1) * limit;\n\n    let where = 'WHERE 1=1';\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (userId) {\n      where += ' AND user_id = ?';\n      params.push(userId);\n    }\n\n    // Count total\n    const countResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM notifications ${where}`\n    ).bind(...params).first();\n    const total = (countResult as any)?.total || 0;\n\n    // Get notifications\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT * FROM notifications ${where} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    ).bind(...params, limit, offset).all();\n\n    // Also get notification logs for broadcast/sent info\n    const logsResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM notification_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?\"\n    ).bind(limit, offset).all();\n\n    // Combine results\n    const documents = [\n      ...(result.results as any[]).map(row => ({\n        id: row.id,\n        title: row.title,\n        message: row.message,\n        type: row.type || 'info',\n        userId: row.user_id,\n        isRead: !!row.is_read,\n        actionUrl: row.action_url,\n        createdAt: row.created_at,\n        source: 'd1',\n      })),\n      ...(logsResult.results as any[]).map(row => ({\n        id: `log-${row.id}`,\n        title: row.title,\n        message: row.message,\n        type: row.metadata ? Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i, 1);\n      monthNames.push(d.toLocaleString('en', { month: 'short' }));\n      monthStarts.push(d.toISOString().split('T')[0]);\n    }\n\n    // Enrollment trend by month\n    const enrollmentTrend = [];\n    for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {\n      const nextMonth = i < 5 ? monthStarts[i + 1] : now.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n      const result = await AND created_at < ?'\n      ).bind(monthStarts[i], nextMonth).first<{ count: number }>().catch(() => ({ count: 0 }));\n      enrollmentTrend.push({\n        month: monthNames[i],\n        enrollments: (result as any)?.count || 0,\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Course distribution by level\n    const levelResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      \"SELECT level, COUNT(*) as count FROM courses GROUP BY level\"\n    ).all().catch(() => ({ results: [] }));\n\n    const levelMap: Record<string, number> = { beginner: 0, intermediate: 0, advanced: 0, expert: 0 };\n    for (const row of levelResult.results as any[]) {\n      const level = (row.level || 'beginner').toLowerCase();\n      if (levelMap[level] !== undefined) {\n        levelMap[level] = row.count;\n      } else {\n        levelMap['beginner'] += row.count;\n      }\n    }\n\n    const courseDistribution = Object.entries(levelMap).map(([name, value]) => ({\n      name: name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + name.slice(1),\n      value,\n    }));\n\n    // User growth (cumulative monthly counts)\n    const userGrowth = [];\n    let cumulative = 0;\n    for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {\n      const nextMonth = i < 5 ? monthStarts[i + 1] : now.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n      const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        'SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM users WHERE created_at >= ? AND created_at < ?'\n      ).bind(monthStarts[i], nextMonth).first<{ count: number }>().catch(() => ({ count: 0 }));\n      cumulative += (result as any)?.count || 0;\n      userGrowth.push({ month: monthNames[i], users: cumulative });\n    }\n\n    // Add total users before the 6-month window to cumulative baseline\n    const totalBeforeWindow = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM users WHERE created_at < ?`\n    ).bind(monthStarts[0]).first<{ count: number }>().catch(() => ({ count: 0 }));\n    const baseline = (totalBeforeWindow as any)?.count || 0;\n\n    // Recalculate with baseline\n    const userGrowthWithBaseline = [];\n    let cum = baseline;\n    for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {\n      const nextMonth = i < 5 ? monthStarts[i + 1] : now.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n      const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        'SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM users WHERE created_at >= ? userId?: string; email?: string; name?: string }> {\n  try {\n    const session = await env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT user_id, email, name, expires_at, is_active FROM student_sessions WHERE id = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    )\n      .bind(token)\n      .first<{ user_id: string; email: string; name: string | null; expires_at: string; is_active: number }>();\n\n    if (!session) {\n      return { authorized: false };\n    }\n\n    // Check expiration\n    const expiresAt = new Date(session.expires_at);\n    if (expiresAt < new Date()) {\n      await env.DB.prepare(\n        'UPDATE student_sessions SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = ?'\n      ).bind(token).run();\n      return { authorized: false };\n    }\n\n    return {\n      authorized: true,\n      userId: session.user_id,\n      email: session.email,\n      name: session.name || undefined,\n    };\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Student session validation error:', error);\n    return { authorized: false };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Create a new student session\n * Returns the session token (ID)\n */\nexport async function createStudentSession(\n  env: Env,\n  userId: string,\n  email: string\n): Promise<string> {\n  const sessionId = generateId();\n  const expiresAt = getSessionExpiry(30); // 30-day session for students\n\n  await env.DB.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO student_sessions (id, user_id, email, expires_at, is_active, created_at)\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 1, datetime('now'))`\n  )\n    .bind(sessionId, userId, email, expiresAt)\n    .run();\n\n  return sessionId;\n}\n\n/**\n * Delete (deactivate) a student session\n */\nexport async function deleteStudentSession(\n  env: Env,\n  token: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  try {\n    await env.DB.prepare(\n      'UPDATE student_sessions SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = ?'\n    ).bind(token).run();\n    return true;\n  } catch {\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n", "/**\n * Hono middleware for Student API authentication\n * Replaces the per-route getStudentAuth() boilerplate\n */\n\nimport type { Context, Next } from 'hono';\nimport type { Env } from '../env';\nimport { validateStudentSession } from './student-auth';\n\nexport interface StudentAuthVariables {\n  studentId: string;\n  studentEmail: string;\n  studentName: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Middleware that validates student session from Authorization header\n * Sets c.set('studentId'), c.set('studentEmail'), c.set('studentName')\n */\nexport async function studentAuthMiddleware(c: Context<{ Bindings: Env; Variables: StudentAuthVariables }>, next: Next) {\n  const authHeader = c.req.header('Authorization');\n  if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {\n    return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized \u2014 login required' }, 401);\n  }\n\n  const token = authHeader.substring(7);\n  const result = await validateStudentSession(c.env, token);\n\n  if (!result.authorized) {\n    return c.json({ error: 'Session expired \u2014 please login again' }, 401);\n  }\n\n  c.set('studentId', result.userId!);\n  c.set('studentEmail', result.email || '');\n  c.set('studentName', result.name || '');\n\n  await next();\n}\n\n/**\n * Optional auth \u2014 doesn't fail if no token, but sets vars if present\n */\nexport async function optionalStudentAuthMiddleware(c: Context<{ Bindings: Env; Variables: StudentAuthVariables }>, next: Next) {\n  const authHeader = c.req.header('Authorization');\n  if (authHeader && authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {\n    const token = authHeader.substring(7);\n    const result = await validateStudentSession(c.env, token);\n    if (result.authorized) {\n      c.set('studentId', result.userId!);\n      c.set('studentEmail', result.email || '');\n      c.set('studentName', result.name || '');\n    }\n  }\n  await next();\n}\n", "/**\n * Student-facing API routes\n * D1-only: All Appwrite dependencies removed\n * Public: config, institutes, { Hono } from 'hono';\nimport type { Env } from '../env';\nimport { validateStudentSession, createStudentSession, deleteStudentSession } from '../lib/student-auth';\nimport { studentAuthMiddleware, Bindings: Env; Variables: StudentAuthVariables }>();\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Helper: Get student auth from header \u2500\u2500\u2500\nasync function getStudentAuth(c: any): Promise<{ authorized: boolean; userId?: string; email?: string; name?: string }> {\n  const authHeader = c.req.header('Authorization');\n  if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {\n    return { authorized: false };\n  }\n  const token = authHeader.substring(7);\n  const result = await validateStudentSession(c.env, token);\n  return result;\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Helper: Hash password using Web Crypto API (SHA-256) \u2500\u2500\u2500\nasync function hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {\n  const encoder = new TextEncoder();\n  const data = encoder.encode(password);\n  const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', data);\n  const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer));\n  return hashArray.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Helper: Get student user from D1 \u2500\u2500\u2500\nasync function getStudentUserDoc(env: Env, userId: string): Promise<Record<string, unknown> | null> {\n  try {\n    const user = \u2500\u2500\u2500 Helper: Transform Worker ServerConfig \u2192 Student-friendly format \u2500\u2500\u2500\nfunction transformConfigForStudent(config: ServerConfig) {\n  return {\n    featureToggles: config.featureToggles,\n    homePageSections: config.homePageSections.sections,\n    sidebarVisibility: config.sidebarVisibility,\n    bottomNavTabs: config.bottomNavTabs.tabs\n      .filter((t) => t.enabled)\n      .sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order)\n      .map((t) => t.id),\n    topBarElements: config.topBarElements,\n    cardStyle: config.cardStyle,\n    contentProtection: config.contentProtection,\n  };\n}\n\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n// PUBLIC ROUTES (no auth required)\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Config \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n// GET /config \u2014 Get server config for student app (public)\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/config', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const cachedConfig = await c.env.KV_CONFIG.get('server_config', 'json');\n    if (cachedConfig) {\n      const config = cachedConfig as ServerConfig;\n      return c.json({ config: transformConfigForStudent(config) });\n    }\n\n    const { results } = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT key, value FROM app_config'\n    ).all<{ key: string; value: string }>();\n\n    const configMap: Record<string, unknown> = {};\n    for (const row of results) {\n      try {\n        configMap[row.key] = JSON.parse(row.value);\n      } catch {\n        configMap[row.key] = row.value;\n      }\n    }\n\n    const config: ServerConfig = {\n      featureToggles: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.featureToggles, ...(configMap.featureToggles as Partial<ServerConfig['featureToggles']>) },\n      homePageSections: (configMap.homePageSections as ServerConfig['homePageSections']) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.homePageSections,\n      sidebarVisibility: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.sidebarVisibility, ...(configMap.sidebarVisibility as Partial<ServerConfig['sidebarVisibility']>) },\n      bottomNavTabs: (configMap.bottomNavTabs as ServerConfig['bottomNavTabs']) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.bottomNavTabs,\n      topBarElements: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.topBarElements, ...(configMap.topBarElements as Partial<ServerConfig['topBarElements']>) },\n      cardStyle: (configMap.cardStyle as ServerConfig['cardStyle']) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.cardStyle,\n      contentProtection: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.contentProtection, ...(configMap.contentProtection as Partial<ServerConfig['contentProtection']>) },\n    };\n\n    await c.env.KV_CONFIG.put('server_config', JSON.stringify(config), { expirationTtl: 300 });\n\n    return c.json({ config: transformConfigForStudent(config) });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ config: transformConfigForStudent(DEFAULT_CONFIG) });\n  }\n});\n\n// GET /config/payment \u2014 Get active payment gateway config (public)\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/config/payment', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id, gateway, is_active, instructions, instructions_bn, sandbox_mode FROM payment_config WHERE is_active = 1'\n    ).all();\n\n    return c.json({ paymentConfig: result.results });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Institutes \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/institutes', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const division = c.req.query('division');\n    const search = c.req.query('search');\n    const page = parseInt(c.req.query('page') || '1');\n    const limit = parseInt(c.req.query('limit') || '50');\n    const offset = (page - 1) * limit;\n\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM institutes WHERE is_active = 1';\n    let countQuery = 'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM institutes WHERE is_active = 1';\n    const params: any[] = [];\n\n    if (division) {\n      query += ' AND division = ?';\n      countQuery += ' AND division = ?';\n      params.push(division);\n    }\n\n    if (search) {\n      query += ' AND (name LIKE ? OR name_bn LIKE ?)';\n      countQuery += ' AND (name LIKE ? OR name_bn LIKE ?)';\n      params.push(`%${search}%`, `%${search}%`);\n    }\n\n    query += ' ORDER BY is_requested ASC, name ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n\n    const countResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(countQuery).bind(...params).first();\n    const total = (countResult as any)?.total || 0;\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(query).bind(...params, limit, offset).all();\n\n    return c.json({ institutes: result.results, total });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/institutes/:id', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const id = c.req.param('id');\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM institutes WHERE id = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    ).bind(id).first();\n\n    if (!result) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Institute not found' }, 404);\n    }\n\n    return c.json({ institute: result });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Technologies \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/technologies', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM technologies WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY name ASC'\n    ).all();\n\n    return c.json({ technologies: result.results });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Events \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/events', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM events WHERE is_active = 1 AND end_date >= date('now') ORDER BY start_date ASC\"\n    ).all();\n\n    return c.json({ events: result.results });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Live Classes \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/live-classes', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM live_class_schedules WHERE is_active = 1 AND status IN ('scheduled', 'live') ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC\"\n    ).all();\n\n    return c.json({ liveClasses: result.results });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Coupons \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/coupons/validate', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const code = c.req.query('code');\n    if (!code) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Coupon code required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    const coupon = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM coupons WHERE code = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    ).bind(code).first();\n\n    if (!coupon) {\n      return c.json({ valid: false, error: 'Invalid coupon code' }, 404);\n    }\n\n    const cp = coupon as any;\n    const now = new Date().toISOString();\n\n    if (cp.valid_from > now || cp.valid_until < now) {\n      return c.json({ valid: false, error: 'Coupon has expired or is not yet active' });\n    }\n\n    if (cp.usage_limit && cp.usage_count >= cp.usage_limit) {\n      return c.json({ valid: false, error: 'Coupon usage limit reached' });\n    }\n\n    return c.json({\n      valid: true,\n      coupon: {\n        code: cp.code,\n        discount_type: cp.discount_type,\n        discount_value: cp.discount_value,\n        max_discount: cp.max_discount,\n        min_purchase: cp.min_purchase,\n      },\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Course Packages \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/course-packages', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const courseId = c.req.query('courseId');\n    if (!courseId) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'courseId required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM course_packages WHERE course_id = ? AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY price ASC'\n    ).bind(courseId).all();\n\n    return c.json({ packages: result.results });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Courses (from D1 \u2014 public catalog) \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/courses', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const technology = c.req.query('technology') || '';\n    const limit = parseInt(c.req.query('limit') || '20');\n    const offset = parseInt(c.req.query('offset') || '0');\n    const search = c.req.query('search') || '';\n    const level = c.req.query('level') || '';\n\n    let where = 'WHERE is_published = 1';\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (technology) {\n      where += ' AND technology_id = ?';\n      params.push(technology);\n    }\n    if (search) {\n      where += ' AND title LIKE ?';\n      params.push(`%${search}%`);\n    }\n    if (level) {\n      where += ' AND level = ?';\n      params.push(level);\n    }\n\n    const countResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM courses ${where}`\n    ).bind(...params).first();\n    const total = (countResult as any)?.total || 0;\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT * FROM courses ${where} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    ).bind(...params, limit, offset).all();\n\n    return c.json({ courses: result.results, total });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/courses/:id', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const id = c.req.param('id');\n    const course = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM courses WHERE id = ? AND is_published = 1'\n    ).bind(id).first();\n\n    if (!course) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Course not found' }, 404);\n    }\n\n    return c.json({ course });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/courses/:id/videos', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const id = c.req.param('id');\n    const limit = parseInt(c.req.query('limit') || '100');\n    const offset = parseInt(c.req.query('offset') || '0');\n\n    const countResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM videos WHERE course_id = ?'\n    ).bind(id).first();\n    const total = (countResult as any)?.total || 0;\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM videos WHERE course_id = ? ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?'\n    ).bind(id, limit, offset).all();\n\n    return c.json({ videos: result.results, total });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Instructors (from D1 \u2014 public) \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/instructors', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const limit = parseInt(c.req.query('limit') || '20');\n    const offset = parseInt(c.req.query('offset') || '0');\n    const search = c.req.query('search') || '';\n\n    let where = 'WHERE is_active = 1';\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (search) {\n      where += ' AND name LIKE ?';\n      params.push(`%${search}%`);\n    }\n\n    const countResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM instructors ${where}`\n    ).bind(...params).first();\n    const total = (countResult as any)?.total || 0;\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT * FROM instructors ${where} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    ).bind(...params, limit, offset).all();\n\n    return c.json({ instructors: result.results, total });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/instructors/:id', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const id = c.req.param('id');\n    const instructor = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM instructors WHERE id = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    ).bind(id).first();\n\n    if (!instructor) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Instructor not found' }, 404);\n    }\n\n    return c.json({ instructor });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Video Streaming \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/video/stream-url', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized \u2014 login required to stream videos' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const key = c.req.query('key');\n    const bucket = c.req.query('bucket') || 'videos';\n\n    if (!key) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'key parameter required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    const r2Bucket = getBucketForType(bucket, c.env);\n    const fileInfo = await r2Bucket.head(key);\n    if (!fileInfo) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Video not found' }, 404);\n    }\n\n    const url = getPublicUrl(c.env, bucket, key);\n\n    return c.json({ url });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n// AUTH ROUTES (D1-only \u2014 no Appwrite)\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n\n// POST /auth/signup \u2014 Create student account\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/auth/signup', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const { fullName, email, password, instituteId, technology } = await c.req.json();\n\n    if (!fullName || !email || !password) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'fullName, email, and password are required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    if (password.length < 8) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Password must be at least 8 characters' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    // Check if user already exists\n    const existing = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?'\n    ).bind(email).first();\n\n    if (existing) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'An account with this email already exists' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    // Create user in D1\n    const userId = crypto.randomUUID();\n    const passwordHash = await hashPassword(password);\n\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(`\n      INSERT INTO users (id, email, full_name, institute_id, technology, role, email_verified, is_active, enrolled_course_ids, password_hash)\n      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'student', 0, 1, '[]', ?)\n    `).bind(userId, email, fullName, instituteId || null, technology || null, passwordHash).run();\n\n    // Create D1 student session\n    const token = await createStudentSession(c.env, userId, email);\n\n    return c.json({\n      success: true,\n      token,\n      userId,\n      user: {\n        id: userId,\n        name: fullName,\n        email,\n        instituteId: instituteId || null,\n        technology: technology || null,\n        emailVerified: false,\n        packages: [],\n      },\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /auth/login \u2014 Login student\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/auth/login', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const { email, password } = await c.req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !password) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Email and password are required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    // Look up user in D1\n    const user = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id, email, full_name, role, password_hash, institute_id, technology, email_verified, is_active FROM users WHERE email = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    ).bind(email).first<{ id: string; email: string; full_name: string; role: string; password_hash: string; institute_id: number | null; technology: string | null; email_verified: number; is_active: number }>();\n\n    if (!user) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Invalid email or password' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    // Verify password\n    const hashedInput = await hashPassword(password);\n    if (hashedInput !== user.password_hash) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Invalid email or password' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    // Verify this is a student (not admin)\n    if (user.role === 'admin') {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Admin accounts cannot login here. Use the admin panel.' }, 403);\n    }\n\n    // Get user packages from D1\n    let userPackages: any[] = [];\n    try {\n      const pkgResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        \"SELECT up.*, cp.package_type, cp.price, cp.duration_months FROM user_packages up JOIN course_packages cp ON up.package_id = cp.id WHERE up.user_id = ? AND up.status = 'active' ORDER BY up.activated_at DESC\"\n      ).bind(user.id).all();\n      userPackages = pkgResult.results as any[];\n    } catch {}\n\n    // Delete any existing D1 sessions and create new one\n    await c.env.DB.prepare('DELETE FROM student_sessions WHERE user_id = ?').bind(user.id).run();\n    const token = await createStudentSession(c.env, user.id, user.email);\n\n    return c.json({\n      success: true,\n      token,\n      userId: user.id,\n      user: {\n        id: user.id,\n        name: user.full_name,\n        email: user.email,\n        instituteId: user.institute_id || null,\n        technology: user.technology || null,\n        emailVerified: !!user.email_verified,\n        packages: userPackages,\n      },\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    const msg = getErrorMessage(error);\n    return c.json({ error: msg.includes('Invalid') ? msg : 'Invalid email or password' }, 401);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /auth/logout \u2014 Logout student\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/auth/logout', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ success: true });\n    }\n\n    const authHeader = c.req.header('Authorization');\n    const token = authHeader?.substring(7) || '';\n    await deleteStudentSession(c.env, token);\n\n    return c.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// GET /auth/me \u2014 Get current student profile\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/auth/me', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    // Get user from D1\n    const userDoc = await getStudentUserDoc(c.env, auth.userId!);\n\n    // Get user packages from D1\n    let userPackages: any[] = [];\n    try {\n      const pkgResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        \"SELECT up.*, cp.package_type, cp.price, cp.duration_months FROM user_packages up JOIN course_packages cp ON up.package_id = cp.id WHERE up.user_id = ? AND up.status = 'active' ORDER BY up.activated_at DESC\"\n      ).bind(auth.userId).all();\n      userPackages = pkgResult.results as any[];\n    } catch {}\n\n    const u = userDoc as any;\n    return c.json({\n      user: {\n        id: auth.userId,\n        name: u?.full_name || auth.name || '',\n        email: auth.email || u?.email || '',\n        instituteId: u?.institute_id || null,\n        technology: u?.technology || null,\n        emailVerified: !!u?.email_verified,\n        avatarUrl: u?.avatar_url || '',\n        packages: userPackages,\n      },\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /auth/verify-otp \u2014 Verify email with OTP\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/auth/verify-otp', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const { email, otp } = await c.req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !otp) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'email and otp are required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    // For MVP: accept any 6-digit OTP and mark email as verified\n    if (otp.length === 6) {\n      const session = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        \"SELECT user_id FROM student_sessions WHERE email = ? AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1\"\n      ).bind(email).first<{ user_id: string }>();\n\n      if (session?.user_id) {\n        await c.env.DB.prepare(\n          'UPDATE users SET email_verified = 1 WHERE id = ?'\n        ).bind(session.user_id).run();\n\n        return c.json({ success: true, message: 'Email verified successfully' });\n      }\n    }\n\n    return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid OTP' }, 400);\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /auth/forgot-password \u2014 Request password reset\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/auth/forgot-password', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const { email } = await c.req.json();\n\n    if (!email) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Email is required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    // Check if user exists\n    const user = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    ).bind(email).first();\n\n    if (user) {\n      // TODO: Send password reset email via Resend\n      // For now, just acknowledge the request\n    }\n\n    // Always return success for security\n    return c.json({ success: true, message: 'If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent.' });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /auth/resend-otp \u2014 Resend OTP for email verification\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/auth/resend-otp', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const { email } = await c.req.json();\n\n    if (!email) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Email is required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    // TODO: Send OTP email via Resend\n    return c.json({ success: true, message: 'Verification email resent if account exists.' });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n// AUTHENTICATED ROUTES\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n\n// POST /institutes/requests \u2014 Request new institute (student)\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/institutes/requests', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const data = await c.req.json();\n    const { institute_name, institute_name_bn, division, district } = data;\n\n    if (!institute_name) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Institute name required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    const existing = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id FROM institutes WHERE name = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    ).bind(institute_name).first();\n\n    if (existing) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'This institute already exists' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    const pending = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      \"SELECT id FROM institute_requests WHERE institute_name = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    ).bind(institute_name).first();\n\n    if (pending) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'A request for this institute is already pending' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(`\n      INSERT INTO institute_requests (user_id, user_email, user_name, institute_name, institute_name_bn, division, district, status)\n      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'pending')\n    `).bind(auth.userId, auth.email, null, institute_name, institute_name_bn || null, division || null, district || null).run();\n\n    return c.json({ success: true, message: 'Institute request submitted' });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/institutes/requests/mine', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM institute_requests WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC'\n    ).bind(auth.userId).all();\n\n    return c.json({ requests: result.results });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/push/register', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const { push_token, device_type, device_info } = await c.req.json();\n    if (!push_token) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'push_token required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    await registerPushToken(c.env, auth.userId!, push_token, device_type, device_info);\n\n    return c.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.delete('/push/unregister', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const { push_token } = await c.req.json();\n    if (!push_token) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'push_token required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    await unregisterPushToken(c.env, push_token);\n\n    return c.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.post('/payments/submit', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const { package_id, trx_id, phone, proof_url } = await c.req.json();\n    if (!package_id || !trx_id) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'package_id and trx_id required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    const pkg = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM course_packages WHERE id = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    ).bind(package_id).first();\n\n    if (!pkg) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Package not found' }, 404);\n    }\n\n    const p = pkg as any;\n\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(`\n      INSERT INTO payments (user_id, package_id, course_id, amount, currency, gateway, trx_id_submitted, phone_submitted, proof_url, status)\n      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'BDT', 'manual', ?, ?, ?, 'pending')\n    `).bind(auth.userId, package_id, p.course_id, p.price, trx_id, phone || null, proof_url || null).run();\n\n    return c.json({ success: true, message: 'Payment submitted for verification' });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentApiRoutes.get('/packages/mine', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const auth = await getStudentAuth(c);\n    if (!auth.authorized) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      \"SELECT up.*, cp.package_type, cp.price, cp.duration_months FROM user_packages up JOIN course_packages cp ON up.package_id = cp.id WHERE up.user_id = ? AND up.status = 'active' ORDER BY up.activated_at DESC\"\n    ).bind(auth.userId).all();\n\n    return c.json({ packages: result.results });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n// AUTHENTICATED STUDENT ROUTES (middleware-based)\n// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n\nconst studentAuthenticated = new Hono<{ Bindings: Env; Variables: StudentAuthVariables }>();\nstudentAuthenticated.use('*', studentAuthMiddleware);\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Notifications (D1) \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentAuthenticated.get('/notifications', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n    const limit = parseInt(c.req.query('limit') || '20');\n    const offset = parseInt(c.req.query('offset') || '0');\n    const unreadOnly = c.req.query('unread') === 'true';\n\n    let where = 'WHERE user_id = ?';\n    const params: unknown[] = [userId];\n\n    if (unreadOnly) {\n      where += ' AND is_read = 0';\n    }\n\n    const countResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM notifications ${where}`\n    ).bind(...params).first();\n    const total = (countResult as any)?.total || 0;\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `SELECT * FROM notifications ${where} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    ).bind(...params, limit, offset).all();\n\n    const notifications = (result.results as any[]).map(row => ({\n      id: row.id,\n      title: row.title || '',\n      message: row.message || '',\n      type: row.type || 'info',\n      actionUrl: row.action_url || '',\n      read: !!row.is_read,\n      createdAt: row.created_at,\n    }));\n\n    return c.json({ notifications, total });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ notifications: [], total: 0 });\n  }\n});\n\nstudentAuthenticated.put('/notifications/:id/read', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n    const notifId = c.req.param('id');\n\n    // Verify this notification belongs to the user\n    const notif = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?'\n    ).bind(notifId, userId).first();\n\n    if (!notif) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Notification not found' }, 404);\n    }\n\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ?'\n    ).bind(notifId).run();\n\n    return c.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\nstudentAuthenticated.put('/notifications/read-all', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0'\n    ).bind(userId).run();\n\n    return c.json({ success: true, count: result.meta?.changes || 0 });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Profile Stats \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentAuthenticated.get('/profile/stats', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n\n    // Get enrolled courses count\n    let coursesEnrolled = 0;\n    try {\n      const enrollResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM enrollments WHERE user_id = ?'\n      ).bind(userId).first();\n      coursesEnrolled = (enrollResult as any)?.total || 0;\n    } catch {}\n\n    // Get certificates count\n    let certificates = 0;\n    try {\n      const certResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM user_packages WHERE user_id = ? AND status = 'completed'\"\n      ).bind(userId).first();\n      certificates = (certResult as any)?.count || 0;\n    } catch {}\n\n    // Calculate current streak\n    let currentStreak = 0;\n    try {\n      const activities = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        \"SELECT DISTINCT date(created_at) as day FROM student_activity WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 30\"\n      ).bind(userId).all();\n\n      const days = (activities.results as any[]).map(r => r.day);\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];\n      const yesterday = new Date(Date.now() - 86400000).toISOString().split('T')[0];\n\n      if (days.length > 0 && (days[0] === today || days[0] === yesterday)) {\n        currentStreak = 1;\n        for (let i = 1; i < days.length; i++) {\n          const prev = new Date(days[i - 1]);\n          const curr = new Date(days[i]);\n          const diff = (prev.getTime() - curr.getTime()) / 86400000;\n          if (diff === 1) {\n            currentStreak++;\n          } else {\n            break;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch {}\n\n    // Get user document for phone, bio, semester, avatarUrl\n    const userDoc = await getStudentUserDoc(c.env, userId);\n    const u = userDoc as any;\n\n    // Get hours watched from student_activity\n    let hoursWatched = 0;\n    try {\n      const watchResult = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n        \"SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN metadata LIKE '%watchMinutes%' THEN CAST(json_extract(metadata, '$.watchMinutes') AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) as total_minutes FROM student_activity WHERE user_id = ? AND activity_type = 'video_watch'\"\n      ).bind(userId).first();\n      hoursWatched = Math.round(((watchResult as any)?.total_minutes || 0) / 60 * 10) / 10;\n    } catch {}\n\n    return c.json({\n      stats: {\n        coursesEnrolled,\n        hoursWatched,\n        certificates,\n        currentStreak,\n      },\n      profile: {\n        phone: u?.phone || '',\n        bio: u?.bio || '',\n        semester: u?.semester || '',\n        avatarUrl: u?.avatar_url || '',\n      },\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Leaderboard \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentAuthenticated.get('/leaderboard', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const technology = c.req.query('technology') || '';\n    const period = c.req.query('period') || 'week';\n    const limit = parseInt(c.req.query('limit') || '20');\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n\n    // Try KV cache first\n    const cacheKey = `leaderboard:${technology}:${period}`;\n    const cached = await c.env.KV_CONFIG.get(cacheKey, 'json');\n    if (cached) {\n      const result = cached as any;\n      const yourEntry = result.entries.find((e: any) => e.userId === userId);\n      result.yourRank = yourEntry ? yourEntry.rank : null;\n      result.yourXp = yourEntry ? yourEntry.xp : 0;\n      return c.json(result);\n    }\n\n    let dateFilter = '';\n    if (period === 'day') {\n      dateFilter = `AND created_at >= date('now', '-1 day')`;\n    } else if (period === 'week') {\n      dateFilter = `AND created_at >= date('now', '-7 days')`;\n    } else if (period === 'month') {\n      dateFilter = `AND created_at >= date('now', '-30 days')`;\n    }\n\n    const d1Query = `\n      SELECT\n        user_id,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN activity_type = 'video_watch' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) as video_xp,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN activity_type = 'quiz_complete' THEN 15 ELSE 0 END) as quiz_xp,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN activity_type = 'assignment_submit' THEN 20 ELSE 0 END) as assignment_xp,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN activity_type = 'streak_bonus' THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) as streak_xp,\n        COUNT(DISTINCT date(created_at)) as active_days,\n        COUNT(*) as total_activities\n      FROM student_activity\n      WHERE 1=1 ${dateFilter}\n      GROUP BY user_id\n      ORDER BY total_activities DESC\n      LIMIT ?\n    `;\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(d1Query).bind(limit).all();\n\n    const entries = [];\n    let rank = 1;\n    let yourRank = null;\n    let yourXp = 0;\n\n    for (const row of result.results as any[]) {\n      let userName = 'Student';\n      let userTechnology = '';\n\n      try {\n        const userDoc = await getStudentUserDoc(c.env, row.user_id);\n        const u = userDoc as any;\n        userName = u?.full_name || u?.name || 'Student';\n        userTechnology = u?.technology || '';\n      } catch {}\n\n      if (technology && userTechnology !== technology) continue;\n\n      const totalXp = (row.video_xp || 0) + (row.quiz_xp || 0) + (row.assignment_xp || 0) + (row.streak_xp || 0);\n\n      if (row.user_id === userId) {\n        yourRank = rank;\n        yourXp = totalXp;\n      }\n\n      entries.push({\n        rank,\n        userId: row.user_id,\n        name: userName,\n        technology: userTechnology,\n        xp: totalXp,\n        breakdown: {\n          video: row.video_xp || 0,\n          quiz: row.quiz_xp || 0,\n          assignment: row.assignment_xp || 0,\n          streak: row.streak_xp || 0,\n        },\n        activeDays: row.active_days || 0,\n        coursesCompleted: 0,\n      });\n\n      rank++;\n    }\n\n    if (!yourRank) {\n      yourXp = 0;\n    }\n\n    const response = {\n      entries,\n      yourRank,\n      yourXp,\n      period,\n      technology: technology || 'all',\n    };\n\n    await c.env.KV_CONFIG.put(cacheKey, JSON.stringify(response), { expirationTtl: 300 });\n\n    return c.json(response);\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ entries: [], yourRank: null, yourXp: 0, error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Achievements \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentAuthenticated.get('/achievements', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n\n    const definitions = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM achievement_definitions WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY category, xp ASC'\n    ).all();\n\n    const unlocked = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM student_achievements WHERE user_id = ?'\n    ).bind(userId).all();\n\n    const unlockedMap = new Map<number, string>();\n    for (const row of (unlocked.results as any[])) {\n      unlockedMap.set(row.achievement_id, row.unlocked_at);\n    }\n\n    const achievements = (definitions.results as any[]).map(def => ({\n      id: def.id,\n      slug: def.slug,\n      name: def.name,\n      nameBn: def.name_bn,\n      description: def.description,\n      descriptionBn: def.description_bn,\n      category: def.category,\n      icon: def.icon,\n      xp: def.xp,\n      conditionType: def.condition_type,\n      unlocked: unlockedMap.has(def.id),\n      unlockedAt: unlockedMap.get(def.id) || null,\n    }));\n\n    const totalXp = achievements.filter(a => a.unlocked).reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.xp, 0);\n    const unlockedCount = achievements.filter(a => a.unlocked).length;\n\n    return c.json({\n      achievements,\n      totalXp,\n      unlockedCount,\n      totalCount: achievements.length,\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ achievements: [], totalXp: 0, unlockedCount: 0, totalCount: 0 });\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Activity Log \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentAuthenticated.get('/activity', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n    const limit = parseInt(c.req.query('limit') || '20');\n    const offset = parseInt(c.req.query('offset') || '0');\n    const activityType = c.req.query('type') || '';\n\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM student_activity WHERE user_id = ?';\n    const params: any[] = [userId];\n\n    if (activityType) {\n      query += ' AND activity_type = ?';\n      params.push(activityType);\n    }\n\n    query += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n    params.push(limit, offset);\n\n    const result = await c.env.DB.prepare(query).bind(...params).all();\n\n    const activities = (result.results as any[]).map(row => ({\n      id: row.id,\n      type: row.activity_type,\n      resourceType: row.resource_type,\n      resourceId: row.resource_id,\n      title: row.title,\n      description: row.description,\n      metadata: row.metadata ? JSON.parse(row.metadata) : {},\n      createdAt: row.created_at,\n    }));\n\n    return c.json({ activities, total: result.results.length });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ activities: [], total: 0 });\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Profile Update \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentAuthenticated.put('/profile', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n    const body = await c.req.json();\n\n    const allowedFields = ['full_name', 'phone', 'bio', 'semester', 'technology', 'institute_id'];\n    const setClauses: string[] = [];\n    const setValues: unknown[] = [];\n\n    for (const field of allowedFields) {\n      if (body[field] !== undefined) {\n        setClauses.push(`${field} = ?`);\n        setValues.push(body[field]);\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Also handle 'name' as 'full_name'\n    if (body.name !== undefined && !body.full_name) {\n      setClauses.push('full_name = ?');\n      setValues.push(body.name);\n    }\n\n    if (setClauses.length === 0) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'No valid fields to update' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    setClauses.push(\"updated_at = datetime('now')\");\n    setValues.push(userId);\n\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `UPDATE users SET ${setClauses.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`\n    ).bind(...setValues).run();\n\n    // Log activity\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(`\n      INSERT INTO student_activity (user_id, activity_type, resource_type, title, description)\n      VALUES (?, 'profile_update', 'profile', 'Profile Updated', 'Updated profile information')\n    `).bind(userId).run();\n\n    return c.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Avatar Upload \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentAuthenticated.post('/upload-avatar', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n    const formData = await c.req.formData();\n    const file = formData.get('avatar') as File | null;\n\n    if (!file) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Avatar file required' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    const allowedTypes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp', 'image/gif'];\n    if (!allowedTypes.includes(file.type)) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Invalid file type. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    if (file.size > 2 * 1024 * 1024) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'File too large. Maximum 2MB.' }, 400);\n    }\n\n    const key = `avatars/${userId}/${Date.now()}-${file.name}`;\n    await c.env.R2_AVATARS.put(key, file.stream(), {\n      httpMetadata: { contentType: file.type },\n    });\n\n    const avatarUrl = `https://dakkho-assets.dakkho.workers.dev/avatars/${key}`;\n\n    // Update user in D1\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE users SET avatar_url = ?, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).bind(avatarUrl, userId).run();\n\n    // Log activity\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(`\n      INSERT INTO student_activity (user_id, activity_type, resource_type, title, description)\n      VALUES (?, 'avatar_upload', 'profile', 'Avatar Updated', 'Updated profile picture')\n    `).bind(userId).run();\n\n    return c.json({ success: true, avatarUrl });\n  } catch (error) {\n    return c.json({ error: getErrorMessage(error) }, 500);\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Notification Settings \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nstudentAuthenticated.get('/settings', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const userId = c.get('studentId');\n\n    const prefs = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT * FROM email: true },\n          schedule: { push: true, email: true },\n          payment: { push: true, email: true },\n          promotions: { push: false, email: false },\n          social: { push: true, email: false },\n          system: { push: true, email: true },\n        },\n      });\n    }\n\n    const p = prefs as any;\n    return c.json({\n      preferences: {\n        pushEnabled: !!p.push_enabled,\n        emailEnabled: !!p.email_enabled,\n        smsEnabled: !!p.sms_enabled,\n        quietHoursStart: p.quiet_hours_start,\n        quietHoursEnd: p.quiet_hours_end,\n        courseUpdates: { push: !!p.course_updates_push, email: !!p.course_updates_email },\n        grades: { push: !!p.grades_push, email: !!p.grades_email },\n        schedule: { push: !!p.schedule_push, email: !!p.schedule_email },\n        payment: { push: !!p.payment_push, email: !!p.payment_email },\n        promotions: { push: !!p.promotions_push, email: !!p.promotions_email },\n        social: { escapeToBuffer = (str, buffer) => {\n  const match = str.search(escapeRe);\n  if (match === -1) {\n    buffer[0] += str;\n    return;\n  }\n  let escape;\n  let index;\n  let lastIndex = 0;\n  for break;\n      case 38:\n        escape = \"&amp;\";\n        break;\n      case 60:\n        escape = \"&lt;\";\n        break;\n      case 62:\n        escape = \"&gt;\";\n        break;\n Provide Authorization: Bearer <token>' }, 401);\n  }\n\n  const token = authHeader.substring(7);\n\n  if (!token) {\n    return c.json({ error: 'Invalid token' }, 401);\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Look up session in D1 by session ID (token = sessionId in our auth model)\n    const session = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id, user_id, email, name, role, expires_at, is_active FROM admin_sessions WHERE id = ? AND is_active = 1'\n    )\n      .bind(email)\n      .first<{ id: string; email: string; full_name: string; role: string; password_hash: string; is_active: number }>();\n\n    if (!user) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Invalid email or password' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    // Step 2: Verify password\n    const hashedInput = await hashPassword(password);\n    if (hashedInput !== user.password_hash) {\n      return c.json({ error: 'Invalid email or password' }, 401);\n    }\n\n    // Step 3: Check admin role\n    if (user.role !== 'admin') {\n      return c.json(\n        { error: 'Access denied. Your account does not have admin privileges.' },\n        403\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Step 4: Create admin session in D1\n    const expiresAt = getSessionExpiry(7);\n    const sessionId = generateId();\n\n    // Delete any existing sessions for this user (active or inactive)\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'DELETE FROM admin_sessions WHERE user_id = ?'\n    ).bind(user.id).run();\n\n    await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO admin_sessions (id, user_id, email, name, role, ip_address, user_agent, expires_at, is_active)\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'admin', ?, ?, ?, 1)`\n    )\n      .bind(\n        sessionId,\n        user.id,\n        user.email,\n        user.full_name,\n        c.req.header('x-forwarded-for') || c.req.header('x-real-ip') || 'unknown',\n        c.req.header('user-agent') || 'unknown',\n        expiresAt\n      )\n      .run();\n\n    // Step 5: Return success with session token\n    return c.json({\n      success: true,\n      token: sessionId,\n      user: { id: user.id, email: user.email, name: user.full_name, role: 'admin' },\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = getErrorMessage(error);\n    console.error('Login error:', error);\n    return c.json({ error: message }, 401);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /check \u2014 Verify if session is valid\nauthRoutes.post('/check', async (c) => {\n  try {\n    const authHeader = c.req.header('Authorization');\n\n    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {\n      return c.json({ authenticated: false }, 401);\n    }\n\n    const token = authHeader.substring(7);\n\n    const session = await c.env.DB.prepare(\n      'SELECT id, user_id, email, name, role, expires_at, is_active FROM admin_sessions WHERE id = ? } from '../env';\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Upload file to R2 \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nexport async function uploadFile(\n  bucket: R2Bucket,\n  key: string,\n  body: ReadableStream | ArrayBuffer | \u2500\u2500\u2500 Delete file from R2 \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nexport async function deleteFile(\n  bucket: R2Bucket,\n  key: string\n): Promise<void> {\n  await bucket.delete(key);\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Get file metadata (HEAD) \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nexport async function getFileInfo(\n  bucket: R2Bucket,\n  key: string\n): Promise<R2Object | null> {\n  return    return true;\n  } catch {\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Get the right R2Bucket binding for a file type \u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nexport function getBucketForType(type: string, return env.R2_RESOURCES;\n    default:\n      return env.R2_RESOURCES;\n  }\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Generate public URL for an R2 object \u2500\u2500\u2500\n// Note: Workers R2 doesn't support presigned URLs natively.\n// Use R2 public bucket or custom domain for public access.\n\nexport function getPublicUrl(env: Env, bucketType: string, key: string): string {\n  // If R2_PUBLIC_URL is set in env, use it; otherwise fall back\n  const envAny = env as unknown as Record<string, unknown>;\n  const publicUrl = envAny.R2_PUBLIC_URL as string | undefined;\n  if (publicUrl) {\n    return
